name: 高府厢房
description: 普通客房,床榻凌乱,被褥散落,衣物散乱堆放。房内设桌椅,桌上茶具倾倒,茶水洒出。门栓从内侧插上,窗户半开。地面铺砖,墙上挂简单字画。房内光线昏暗,气氛混乱。角落设衣架,衣物不整。
visual_reference: Ming Dynasty estate side room, disheveled interior, messy bed with scattered bedding, clothes in disarray, overturned tea set on table, door bolt from inside, half-open window, brick floor, simple paintings on wall, dim lighting, chaotic atmosphere, clothing rack with disarranged garments, scandal scene, traditional Chinese interior
lighting: 昏暗日光从半开窗户透入,室内阴影重重
